name: Pink Daisy Kids' Wallpaper - Pillowfort™
description: Instantly liven up the look of your child's room with this Pink Daisy Wallpaper from Pillowfort™. The self-adhesive wallpaper gives you the perfect way to dress up plain walls without worrying about the hassle of permanent paint. A sweet print of white daisies with yellow centers is set on a pale pink background, lending a soft pop of color that won't overwhelm the existing decor. The peel-and-stick design makes it easy to apply, and it's repositionable so you can adjust and move the wallpaper with ease.
